The drop.

VOL 01 · 8 PIECES · $25 EACH

Made for the in-between.

Static Apparel Co. is a small-batch streetwear label born from analog noise, broken signals, and the static between channels.

Every hoodie in this drop is heavyweight cotton fleece, screen-printed by hand, and built to live in. No fast fashion. No mass production. Just clothes for people who think a little differently.

100%
COTTON FLEECE

N
// THE MAKER

Nathan C. is so proud of his work.

Every line of code, every glitch, every pixel of this drop was put together by Nathan C. — and honestly, he's beaming about it. Years of late nights, ruined hoodies, and refusing to settle for "good enough" went into this collection. He poured his whole heart into Static Apparel Co., and it shows.

So if you're rocking one of these hoodies — know that somewhere out there, Nathan is grinning ear to ear. This one's his baby. And he absolutely nailed it.

Big love, the Static crew
